title: Private Tutoring
description: One-on-one lessons tailored to your pace, goals, and learning style. Whether you're a complete beginner or preparing for an exam, each session is built around you.

title: Group Classes
description: Learn alongside others in small, focused groups. Practice conversation, build confidence, and enjoy the social energy of group learning.

title: Online Lessons
description: Connect from anywhere with live video lessons. Same quality instruction with the convenience of learning from home or while traveling.

title: JLPT Preparation
description: Targeted preparation for all JLPT levels (N5 through N1). Focused practice on reading, listening, vocabulary, and grammar sections.

title: Business Japanese
description: Professional Japanese for the workplace — keigo (formal speech), email writing, meeting etiquette, and industry-specific vocabulary.

title: Kids & Teens
description: Fun, engaging lessons designed for younger learners. Games, songs, and activities make language learning an adventure.
